name: openfec-mcp-server
description: Access FEC campaign finance data. Query data about candidates, money trails, and election filings.

FEC_API_KEY.title: OpenFEC API Key
FEC_API_KEY.description: Optional. Falls back to DEMO_KEY (30 req/hr). Own key: 1000 req/hr. Free signup at api.data.gov.

MCP_LOG_LEVEL.title: Log Level
MCP_LOG_LEVEL.description: Minimum log level for output (debug, info, warn).
